title: Arata Kaizaki (27), Unemployed
overview: Arata Kaizaki is twenty-seven years old and doesn't have a steady job. His parents even threaten to stop sending him money, but that's when he he meets Yoake Ryo, who has a tantalizing offer for him.

title: Communication Skills: Zero
overview: Arata meets Chiziru Hishiro, a girl who has zero communication skills but is trying her best to change.

title: You're Old Now
overview: Arata receives a grim reminder of his physical age during athletic testing.

title: Fall
overview: Rena Kariu is thrown for a loop by what she thinks is Chizuru's spiteful behavior toward her.

title: Overlap
overview: Things come to a head between Rena and Chizuru, which reminds Arata about a traumatic experience in his past.

title: This Isn't the First Time
overview: An Onoya and Kazuomi Ooga suddenly visit Arata for a study session, after which An puts the moves on Arata?!

title: Test Subject 001 → 002
overview: Ryou reflects on the year before and his failure supporting test subject no. 001

title: Rift
overview: Honoka is distracted by her troubles and inadvertently causes an injury to Rena.

title: Revenge
overview: The rift between Rena and Honoka grows ever larger as the former decides to retire from high-school volleyball, but Chizuru and Arata decide to fix things.

title: Everyone's Selfish Desires
overview: Things come to a head as Chizuru and Arata decide to confront Rena over her behavior.

title: A Trip to the Past
overview: Arata decides to visit a grave and ends up taking a trip down memory lane.

title: Double Panic
overview: Arata, once and for all, tries to make the dense-as-can-be Kazuomi realize what he has in his hands.

title: Confession
overview: At the fireworks display, everyone puts their plans into motion and tries to make things work between Kazuomi and Rena. Meanwhile, a different pairing begins to take shape...
